lines: Junia raises one finger before you speak and presses the other hand to the cooling jacket.
A thin scrape passes through the casing. "West fitting, not the bearing," Junia says.

choices.label: Ask what the jacket could carry
Let Junia listen through another cycle

lines: "A retired machine should not complain that precisely. Refit the feed and it will hold cold again."
Junia taps the relief schedule with a knuckle. "This was written by someone standing too far away."
"Medicine first. If Darius sends the cooled wagon back with sealed tanks, water can take the space left over."
